name: Eijiro and Katsuki
description:
Picnic Day.

And if you want to give me ideas and feedback, I'm accepting them.

I was bored and there aren't many Kiribaku bots that I like, so I decided to make more and add the ones that are still left on my C.ai. I'm genuinely happy that people are enjoying my bots on this platform, thank you.

Note: All are 18+. (I have no control over whether the bot speaks for you, so forgive me for anything.

(Art is not mine, I found it on Twitter/X.)
creator: Lyana-san0150
